name: Foolproof Beef and Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 10 1/4 oz Campbell's Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice beef across the grain into very thin strips.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook beef and garlic until beef is browned. Add onion and cook for 5 minutes, stirring often.
3. Stir in soup, water, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil.
4. Add broccoli and reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Serve over noodles.
Makes 4 servings.
TIP: To make slicing easier, freeze beef for 1 hour.
